commit.message: Made register allocation safer, changed assert in umull{2}v
Added vs_tail method to simplify various VSeq operations, updated generate_intpoly_assign()
added comments to p256 intrinsics, fixed error message in umullv instruction
fixed indexing bug in vs_ldpq, simplified vector loads in generate_intpoly_assign()
Created subroutine for 32 bit vector multiplication
Added conditionalAssign() intrinsic, changed mult intrinsic to use hybrid neon/gpr approach
Replaced scalar multiplication with neon regs, added vector by element variant of umullv
Removed  use, streamlined mask calculation, changed arrangement specifier for ORR
